Hardware Component File

APB_X95_X080_4

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference APB_X95_X080_4.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 755
Receive ID 775
Functional Addr 0D
Functional Name Frein de parking électrique

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "AA9",
    "soft": "0080",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]
